name: sqlite3-pcre2
title: sqlite3-pcre2
summary: Perl-compatible regular expression support for SQLite
description:
Perl-compatible regular expression support for SQLite
This package provides an extension for sqlite3 that uses libpcre2
to provide the REGEXP() function.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use sqlite3-pcre2 because Perl-compatible regular expression support for SQLite.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use sqlite3-pcre2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair sqlite3-pcre2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `sqlite3-pcre2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
